Author: endsingersena
Name: Endsinger AI
Description: Build an item-level climb checklist and easy crafting plan. Endsinger AI tells you where to go and what to get, but never moves or controls your character. Open with /endsingerai.
Punchline: Clear, manual guidance for gearing and crafting.
Changelog: Adds a cute unified Companion Hub for detecting and opening the original UIs of AutoDuty, BossMod Reborn, Discord Rich Presence, Rotation Solver Reborn, and vnavmesh, plus saved 0.90x–1.60x UI scaling.
